name: Moneytree
description_short: Moneytree is a California-licensed lender offering payday loans up to $255, check cashing services, wire transfers, and prepaid cards at physical branch locations.
description_long:
Moneytree operates as a licensed consumer finance company in California, regulated by the Department of Financial Protection and Innovation under the CA Deferred Deposit Transaction Law. The Oceanside location is one of multiple branches offering quick access to emergency cash and financial services. The company specializes in short-term payday loans and check cashing, positioning itself as a convenient alternative to traditional banking for customers needing immediate funds. Moneytree has maintained a 4.7-star rating, suggesting consistent customer satisfaction at this location.

Moneytree's primary services include payday loans up to $255 with same-day or next-day funding options, including cash disbursement, ACH transfers, or Instant Funding to qualified debit cards. The check cashing service accepts payroll, government, personal, insurance, settlement, cashier's, tax refund, and other check types with transparent fee structures ranging from 1.99% (payroll/government/tax checks) to 6.99% (personal checks), plus a flat $1.99 fee on transactions over $20. Additional services include business check cashing, wire transfers, and prepaid card offerings. The Oceanside branch operates extended hours (10 AM–7 PM Friday, 10 AM–6 PM most weekdays, 10 AM–5 PM Saturday) to accommodate working customers.

Moneytree distinguishes itself through transparent fee disclosure, multiple funding delivery options including Instant Funding technology, and immediate check cashing with no bank holds. The company provides clear APR disclosure (460.16% on a 14-day $100 loan example at $17.65 per $100 borrowed) and includes a customer notice warning that small-dollar loans used long-term can be expensive. The application requirements are straightforward: valid ID, Social Security Number/ITIN, proof of income, and an active checking account. The company explicitly excludes military members under the Military Lending Act.

However, Moneytree's payday loans carry exceptionally high APR rates (460.16% example), making them suitable only for genuine short-term emergencies, not ongoing financial management. The $255 maximum loan amount is relatively modest and may not cover larger emergencies. While check cashing fees are lower than some competitors for payroll/government checks, personal check fees (6.99%) remain substantial. Customers should view these services as last-resort options for immediate cash needs rather than sustainable financial solutions.
pros: Multiple funding methods: cash in-hand, ACH transfer, or Instant Funding to qualified debit cards (30-45 minute processing)
Check cashing with no bank holds and immediate access to funds for most checks
Transparent fee structure clearly displayed: 1.99% for payroll/government/tax checks, with additional $1.99 flat fee on transactions over $20
Extended business hours (Friday until 7 PM, weekdays until 6 PM, Saturday until 5 PM) to accommodate working customers
Low barrier to entry: minimal documentation required (ID, SSN, proof of income, checking account)
4.7-star customer rating suggesting consistent service quality
Licensed and regulated by California Department of Financial Protection and Innovation with clear legal compliance
cons: Payday loan APR of 460.16% is extremely high and suitable only for emergency short-term borrowing, not sustainable debt management
Maximum payday loan amount of $255 is relatively low and may not cover larger emergencies
Personal check cashing fee of 6.99% is significantly higher than payroll/government checks (1.99%), penalizing customers without regular payroll deposits
Payday loans create debt cycles—website warns 'small-dollar loans used over a long period of time can be expensive'
Instant Funding not available for all debit cards and has variable processing times despite 30-45 minute estimate
best_for: Employed individuals with urgent short-term cash needs before payday who can repay within 14 days
Workers without bank accounts or traditional banking relationships needing check cashing services
Customers needing wire transfers or prepaid card services as an alternative to traditional banks
People seeking fast emergency cash ($100-$255) with same-day funding capability
diagnosis: Moneytree is best for employed individuals facing genuine short-term emergencies who can repay within 14 days and workers needing check cashing or wire transfer services. The critical caveat: payday loans at 460% APR should only be used as a last resort for true emergencies, not ongoing financial management—the company's own disclaimer warns that repeated use becomes extremely expensive and can trap borrowers in debt cycles.
services: Check cashing (payroll, government, personal, insurance, settlement, cashier's, tax refund, pension)
ACH bank transfers for loan funding
Instant Funding to qualified debit cards

places_enrichment.adr_format_address: 518 Oceanside Blvd #112, Oceanside, CA 92054, USA
